title: Better and more beautiful view than Twin Peaks, with no crowds
content: I believe it has the best view over San Francisco in the City, better than all of the other more famous and well-visited viewpoints.

title: Twin Peaks San Francisco. The Best San Francisco View!
content: 3. Twin Peaks San Francisco. ### The Best San Francisco View! Head for the top of Twin Peaks, San Francisco. San Francisco has lots of great viewpoints, but I think Twin Peaks has the best overall view of the city and its beautiful natural setting. In 2020, the access from Clarendon Road on the other side was permanently closed to cars. Twin Peaks San Francisco city viewView of San Francisco from Twin Peaks. ## What can you see from Twin Peaks? From the viewing area next to the parking lot at the top, you can see many of **San Francisco's landmarks**: the Golden Gate Bridge, Bay Bridge, Alcatraz, Transamerica Building, downtown skyscrapers and Market Street. ## Is Twin Peaks in San Francisco worth visiting? The view from Twin Peaks is one of the best views of the whole city of San Francisco (and the Bay Area) that you'll find. ### Can you go to Twin Peaks at night?
